abilities.name: Hold the Line
abilities.effect: Rally. All allies gain +15% Defense and +15% Magic Defense for 3 turns. Only one Rally can be active at a time. Rally ends if Cael is Fainted, Silenced, or Asleep.
abilities.description: Rally the party, bolstering their physical and magical defenses.

abilities.name: Press Forward
abilities.effect: Rally. All allies gain +20% Attack and +10% Speed for 3 turns. Only one Rally can be active at a time. Rally ends if Cael is Fainted, Silenced, or Asleep.
abilities.description: Rally the party to press the offensive with increased attack and speed.

abilities.name: Second Wind
abilities.effect: Rally. All allies regenerate 5% max HP at the start of each of their turns for 4 turns. Only one Rally can be active at a time. Rally ends if Cael is Fainted, Silenced, or Asleep.
abilities.description: Rally the party with sustained healing over time.

abilities.name: Vanguard Strike
abilities.effect: Command. Cael designates one enemy. The next ally to act gains a guaranteed critical hit against that target.
abilities.description: Designate an enemy target, granting the next ally a guaranteed critical hit.

abilities.name: Unbreakable
abilities.effect: Rally. Once during this Rally's duration (3 turns), if any ally would be reduced to 0 HP, they survive with 1 HP instead. Triggers once then the Rally ends. Only one Rally can be active at a time. Rally ends if Cael is Fainted, Silenced, or Asleep.
abilities.description: Rally the party with a last-stand effect, preventing one fatal blow.
